description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android Full that runs on every push and pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to build for multiple Android platforms and architectures. For each build, use the addnab/docker-run-action to run a Docker container with the specified image and options, and execute scripts to install dependencies, build, and deploy. For tag pushes, perform a release build and upload to a private repository using softprops/action-gh-release. For non-tag pushes to the master branch, perform a daily build and upload to a private repository.
